nasb.text: And He said, “To you it has been granted to know the mysteries of the kingdom of God, but to the rest it is in parables, so that seeing they may not see, and hearing they may not understand.

esv.text: he said, “To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of God, but for others they are in parables, so that ‘seeing they may not see, and hearing they may not understand.’

cnv.text: 他說：“　神的國的奧祕，只給你們知道，對別人就用比喻，叫他們看卻看不見，聽卻聽不明白。

ccb.text: 耶稣便说：“上帝国的奥秘只让你们知道，对其他人，我就用比喻，使他们看却看不见，听却听不明白。

csbs.text: 他说：“神国的奥秘已经赐下来让你们知道，但是对其他的人就用比喻。这是为要使 ‘他们看，却看不见； 听，却不领悟。’
